prompt: A photorealistic television news broadcast scene featuring a female Japanese news anchor wearing a dark blue blazer over a white top sitting at a glass desk in a modern newsroom studio. She is smiling and looking directly at the camera, with her hands resting near a tablet, papers, and a clear water bottle. To her left, a large monitor displays the text "OpenAI 「GPT-image-2」リリース" alongside an AI logo and a collage of 8 smaller diverse AI-generated images. In the top left corner, a channel logo reads "GLOBAL NEWS" with a red "LIVE" badge. The background shows a busy office with computers and a wall screen displaying "AI Generation". At the bottom of the screen, a standard news lower-third graphic displays the anchor's name "キャスター：佐藤 陽子" and a breaking news headline reading "【速報】OpenAI、画期的な新型画像生成モデル「GPT-image-2」を発表。より高精細で多様な表現が可能に。" in bold Japanese text.
